name: create_folder
description: Creates a new folder in google drive, optionally within a parent folder specified by its id or name; if a parent name is provided but not found, the action will fail.

parent_id.description:
ID or name of the parent folder. If a name is provided, the action attempts to find it. If an ID is provided, it must be a valid Google Drive folder ID. If omitted, the folder is created in the Drive root.
Examples:
  "0AGr3s6kL3rIuUk9PVA"
  "Existing Parent Folder Name"
  "1A2b3C4d5E6fG7h8I9j0KlMNOPqRstUVW"

folder_name.description:
Name for the new folder.
Examples:
  "Project Files"
  "Documents"
  "Reports"
